name: Nifty Hamburgers on a Bun
recipeInstructions:
1. Use small hamburger buns or 6 slices of bread.
2. Heat oven to 500°F (260°C).
3. Spread mustard on the cut sides of the buns or one side of each bread slice.
4. Mix ground beef, chopped onion, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Spread the meat mixture over the mustard, ensuring it reaches the edges of the buns.
6. Place the buns meat-side up on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake until the desired doneness is reached (about 5 minutes).
8. If preparing ahead, after spreading the meat mixture over the buns, wrap each securely in heavy-duty or double thickness aluminum foil and label. Freeze for up to 2 months.
9. To serve, unwrap the desired number of hamburgers and bake about 10 minutes.
